last_result: Batch-level provider preflight at d2624be now rejects the invalid DeepSeek credential before creating formal seed directories. A development-only external_teacher diagnostic at 85cc392 found within-distribution signal for the frozen nine features, but the predeclared k=5 selector changed from +0.8820% in stratified five-fold validation to -0.1896% under leave-one-environment-out; it is not a formal Agent candidate and confirmation remains untouched.
